records.ety: [OF. apportionner, LL. apportionare, fr. L. ad + portio. See Portion.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Apportioned (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Apportioning.]

defs: To divide and assign in just proportion; to divide and distribute proportionally; to portion out; to allot; as, to apportion undivided rights; to apportion time among various employments.
